overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt ranch road through rural countryside. The character passes wooden barns, fences, and encounters other characters on horseback while heading toward a distant gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: ranch entrance with wooden barn and fenced pastures

events.description: character passes the NPC pedestrian walking on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path away from the barn, approaching and passing an NPC

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: large dark wooden barn with sloped roof and weathered planks
weathered split-rail wooden fence lining the left pasture
wooden fence enclosing the right pasture with green grass
unpaved dirt road with grass verges and wheel ruts
wooden utility pole with crossbar and hanging lantern

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a large dark wooden barn and walks along a dirt ranch road. Wooden fences line both sides of the path, and a telegraph pole stands on the left. An NPC pedestrian walks ahead on the right side and is passed by the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: ranch road with wooden outbuildings and utility poles

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through the ranch property with no other people visible

entered.detail: small wooden shed with slanted roof beside the right fence

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the barn and continues through the ranch. A small wooden shed appears on the right side of the path, while the telegraph pole passes by on the left. The left fence recedes into the middle distance as the path continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ranch land with grazing animals and distant mountains

events.description: two characters on horseback appear ahead on the path and begin moving away
character passes the two horse riders on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the path and overtaking two riders on horseback

notable_agents.action: two characters riding horses along the path moving away from the camera

entered.detail: two characters on horseback moving along the dirt road ahead
large spreading oak tree with dense green canopy in the pasture
distant mountain range with snow visible on the peaks
white sheep grazing behind the wooden fence on the right

segments.scene_description: Two horse riders appear ahead on the path and are passed by the character. The landscape opens up to reveal distant snow-capped mountains on the right and a large oak tree on the left. Sheep can be seen grazing in the right pasture behind the fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland approaching a wooden gate

events.description: character approaches a wooden gate structure blocking the end of the path

agents.ego_description: walking toward a wooden gate at the end of the path through open countryside

entered.detail: wooden fence gate blocking the end of the dirt road with horizontal rails

segments.scene_description: The character continues through open grassland toward a wooden gate at the end of the path. The large oak tree on the left grows closer and more prominent, while the ranch fences fall behind. The horse riders disappear into the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt ranch road that transitions from a confined farmyard into an expansive rural landscape. It begins beside a large dark wooden barn and a telegraph pole, moving past a pedestrian along a path lined with wooden fences. As the character advances, the scene opens up, passing a small wooden shed on the right before encountering two horse riders on the road. The environment then expands to reveal sheep grazing in pastures and distant snow-capped mountains, while a large oak tree emerges prominently on the left. Finally, the ranch fences recede into the background as the camera moves through open grassland toward a wooden gate at the end of the path.
